title: Define Drop-down List Properties (Character Mode)
text: Define Drop-down List Properties (Character Mode) Define the properties of this drop-down list when it appears in character mode. For more information about drop-down lists, see udropdownlist (DropDownList) . Properties Sort Alphabetically Value and Representation How to Setting Widget Properties Related Links Widgets and Character Mode If you create components that are intended for use in a character mode environment, be economical with the amount of text you display in each label and widget. ValRep Lists and Ranges Fields have a ValRep property that can be used to define a limited range of possible values for that field. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
